sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22241" key="gla/ssa" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλάσσα</orth>, <sense id="n22241.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">γλῶσσα</ref> </xr>:—hence <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλάσσων·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μωρός</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
